Constant
5 C 5 1111111111 a mismatch

5 I 7 0001010011 4 mismatch

5 I 2 0101101010 5 mismatch

Binary 72
5 AND 72 0001000010 2 mismatch

5 OR 72n 1010000100 3 mismatch

Starting at I 4 increasing
I 5 0111110111 partial 1001110111 7
I 6 1011010010 partial 0011001100 4
I 7 0001010011 partial 0101101010 5
left 16
Starting at I 3 decreasing
I 2 0101101010 partial 0001010011 4

Choosing right
3 I 0
4 I 1
5 I 2

Selected
0 I 2
1 I 3
2 I 4
3 XOR 50
4 XOR 61
5 XOR 72
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 01011010
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 2 = 0
1 I 3 = 1
2 I 4 = 1
3 XOR 50 = XOR(I 5,I 0) = XOR(0,0) = 0
4 XOR 61 = XOR(I 6,I 1) = XOR(1,1) = 0
5 XOR 72 = XOR(I 7,I 2) = XOR(0,0) = 0
6 I 3 = 1
7 I 4 = 1

\boxed{01100011}
